title: selaginella subisophylla
intro: Selaginella subisophylla, also known as a species of spikemoss, is a type of ancient plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella subisophylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. In terms of herbal preparations, Selaginella subisophylla can be consumed as a tea, taken as a capsule, or used topically in creams and ointments.
